project.name: generic_app
project.description: Fullstack modular monolith: FastAPI backend with AI/RAG/memory modules and React frontend.

layers.name: Frontend (React/Vite)
layers.description: React UI, pages, components, hooks, and client API layer.

layers.name: API & HTTP
layers.description: FastAPI routers, middleware, dependencies, and route handlers.

layers.name: Application Services
layers.description: Use-case orchestration in backend modules (services, application/).

layers.name: Domain Models
layers.description: Domain entities, enums, and module models.

layers.name: Infrastructure
layers.description: Repositories, adapters, external integrations (pgvector, Mem0, storage).

layers.name: Core & Shared Libs
layers.description: Cross-cutting backend core config, cache, pagination, vector helpers.

layers.name: Background Workers
layers.description: Celery tasks and async job dispatch.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with README and AGENTS.md for stack conventions and module boundaries.

tour.title: API Entry Point
tour.description: FastAPI app bootstrap, lifespan, and v1 router aggregation.

tour.title: AI & Agent Layer
tour.description: Prompt runs, agent orchestration, and AI providers.

tour.title: RAG Pipeline
tour.description: Document ingestion, chunking, embedding, retrieval, and RAG answers.

tour.title: Memory Layer
tour.description: Mem0 integration, recall ranking, and memory consolidation.

tour.title: Frontend Shell
tour.description: App layout, routing, auth context, and query client.
